<mxGeometry height="1050" width="2190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> <diagram id="viuHEJO_jdbIX-fiNnYB" name="classdiagrammV2"> <mxGraphModel dx="3220" dy="1827" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml VulnaRebel\n\nleft to right direction\n\nskinparam packageStyle rectangle\nskinparam classAttributeIconSize 0\n\nskinparam class {\n BackgroundColor White\n BorderColor Black\n ArrowColor Black\n}\n\npackage \"core\" {\n class Main {\n +main(args: String[]): void\n }\n class Application {\n -server: VulnaHttpServer\n -router: Router\n +start(): void\n +stop(): void\n }\n}\n\npackage \"config\" {\n class ConfigurationLoader {\n +{static} load(classpathResource: String): Configuration\n }\n class Configuration {\n -properties: Properties\n +getString(key: String): String\n +getInt(key: String): int\n +getBoolean(key: String): boolean\n }\n}\n\npackage \"http\" {\n class VulnaHttpServer {\n -server: HttpServer\n -config: Configuration\n +start(): void\n +stop(): void\n +addContext(path: String, handler: HttpHandler): void\n +applyRoutes(router: Router): void\n }\n class Router {\n -routes: List<Route>\n +register(route: Route): void\n +getRoutes(): List<Route>\n }\n class Route {\n -path: String\n -handler: HttpHandler\n +getPath(): String\n +getHandler(): HttpHandler\n }\n abstract class BaseHandler {\n #{static} TEXT_HTML: String\n #{static} TEXT_PLAIN: String\n +{final} handle(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n #doGet(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n #doPost(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n #sendResponse(exchange: HttpExchange, status: int, contentType: String, body: String): void\n #sendResponse(exchange: HttpExchange, status: int, contentType: String, body: byte[]): void\n #readBody(exchange: HttpExchange): String\n #readResource(classpathPath: String): byte[]\n #parseFormBody(body: String): Map<String,String>\n }\n class IndexHandler {\n #doGet(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n }\n}\n\npackage \"database\" {\n class DatabaseManager {\n -config: Configuration\n +getConnection(): Connection\n }\n class SchemaInitializer {\n -manager: DatabaseManager\n -challengeConfig: Configuration\n +initialize(challengeName: String): void\n -executeSqlFile(conn: Connection, path: String): void\n }\n}\n\npackage \"challenge\" {\n abstract class Challenge {\n -config: Configuration\n +config(): Configuration\n +{abstract} route(): Route\n +initialize(): void\n }\n}\n\npackage \"challenge.loginsqli\" {\n class LoginSqliChallenge {\n -dbManager: DatabaseManager\n +route(): Route\n +initialize(): void\n }\n class LoginHandler {\n -service: LoginService\n -challengeConfig: Configuration\n #doGet(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n #doPost(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n }\n class LoginService {\n -manager: DatabaseManager\n +attemptLogin(username: String, password: String): boolean\n }\n}\n\npackage \"challenge.reflectedxss\" {\n class ReflectedXssChallenge {\n +route(): Route\n }\n class ReflectedXssHandler {\n -challengeConfig: Configuration\n #doGet(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n #doPost(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n }\n}\n\n' Relationships — core\nMain ..> Application\nMain ..> Router\nMain ..> Route\nMain ..> VulnaHttpServer\nMain ..> DatabaseManager\nMain ..> ConfigurationLoader\nMain ..> Challenge\n\n' config\nConfigurationLoader ..> Configuration\n\n' Application\nApplication o-- VulnaHttpServer\nApplication o-- Router\n\n' http\nVulnaHttpServer ..> Router\nRouter o-- Route\nRoute o-- BaseHandler\nIndexHandler --|> BaseHandler\n\n' database\nDatabaseManager o-- Configuration\nSchemaInitializer o-- DatabaseManager\nSchemaInitializer o-- Configuration\n\n' challenge abstract\nChallenge o-- Configuration\n\n' login sqli\nLoginSqliChallenge --|> Challenge\nLoginSqliChallenge o-- DatabaseManager\nLoginSqliChallenge ..> LoginHandler\nLoginSqliChallenge ..> LoginService\nLoginSqliChallenge ..> SchemaInitializer\nLoginHandler --|> BaseHandler\nLoginHandler o-- LoginService\nLoginHandler o-- Configuration\nLoginService o-- DatabaseManager\n\n' reflected xss\nReflectedXssChallenge --|> Challenge\nReflectedXssChallenge ..> ReflectedXssHandler\nReflectedXssHandler --|> BaseHandler\nReflectedXssHandler o-- Configuration\n\nnote bottom of LoginService\n Deliberately uses string\n concatenation — no PreparedStatement.\n This IS the vulnerability.\nend note\n\n@enduml",
 "format": "svg"

gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml VulnaRebel_Resources\n\nskinparam packageStyle rectangle\nskinparam linetype ortho\nskinparam classAttributeIconSize 0\nskinparam class {\n BackgroundColor White\n BorderColor #888\n ArrowColor #444\n}\nskinparam package {\n BorderColor #aaa\n BackgroundColor #fafafa\n}\n\npackage \"article\" {\n class ResourceIndexHandler {\n -cards: List<ArticleCard>\n #doGet(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n }\n\n class ResourceHandler {\n -renderer: TemplateRenderer\n #doGet(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n }\n\n class ArticleCard <<record>> {\n +title: String\n +description: String\n +route: String\n }\n}\n\npackage \"html\" {\n class TemplateRenderer <<final>> {\n -config: Configuration\n +render(html: byte[]): String\n -applyInlineFormatting(text: String): String\n }\n}\n\npackage \"config\" {\n class Configuration {\n -properties: Properties\n +getString(key: String): String\n +asMap(): Map<String, String>\n }\n class ConfigurationLoader {\n +{static} load(classpathResource: String): Configuration\n }\n}\n\npackage \"http\" {\n abstract class BaseHandler {\n #doGet(exchange: HttpExchange): void\n #sendResponse(...): void\n #readResource(path: String): byte[]\n }\n}\n\nnote as PropertiesNote\n article .properties files\n (one per resource article)\n ——————————————————\n article.title=...\n article.subtitle=...\n article.introduction.title=...\n article.introduction.text=...\n article.mechanism.title=...\n article.mechanism.text=...\n article.exploitation.title=...\n article.exploitation.text=...\n article.defense.title=...\n article.defense.text=...\nend note\n\n' Inheritance\nResourceIndexHandler --|> BaseHandler\nResourceHandler --|> BaseHandler\n\n' Composition\nResourceIndexHandler o-- ArticleCard : List<ArticleCard>\nResourceHandler o-- TemplateRenderer\n\n' TemplateRenderer depends on Configuration\nTemplateRenderer o-- Configuration\n\n' ConfigurationLoader produces Configuration\nConfigurationLoader ..> Configuration : creates\n\n' Properties files feed into ConfigurationLoader\nPropertiesNote ..> ConfigurationLoader : loaded by\n\nnote bottom of ResourceHandler\n One instance per article route.\n e.g. /resources/sql-injection\n /resources/blind-sqli\n /resources/xss\nend note\n\nnote bottom of ResourceIndexHandler\n Single instance at /resources.\n Renders one HTML card per\n ArticleCard in the list.\nend note\n\nnote right of TemplateRenderer\n Backtick syntax converted\n to <code> tags before\n placeholder injection.\nend note\n\n@enduml",
 "config": null
